message:
refactor: Duration::from_mins in bulkhead, conformance, fs, signal tests

Continued from_secs(60) → from_mins(1) normalization in test code:

- combinator/bulkhead.rs: BulkheadPolicy queue_timeout (3 test sites)
- conformance/mod.rs: TestConfig builder timeout + assertion
- fs/metadata.rs: modified-time freshness assertion threshold
- signal/graceful.rs: GracefulBuilder grace_period + assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
